task_completion.description: Verify StudioTax 2024 is open with a profile created or opened for Julian Baptiste.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax 2024 application window with 'Julian Baptiste' visible in the personal information section, client list, or active return tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the departure/emigration date is set to September 30, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Date of Departure' or part-year resident section in the personal information/Info page of StudioTax showing '09-30' or 'September 30'.

task_completion.description: Verify T4 employment income of $115,000 is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a T4 data entry screen in StudioTax showing employment income (Box 14) of $115,000.

task_completion.description: Verify T1243 form (Deemed Disposition) is completed with proceeds of $135,000 and ACB of $45,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T1243 form or deemed disposition entry screen showing Proceeds of Disposition as $135,000 and Adjusted Cost Base (ACB) as $45,000.

task_completion.description: Verify Home Buyers' Plan (HBP) unpaid balance inclusion of $12,000 is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the HBP section (Schedule 7 or specific HBP entry form) showing a repayment or inclusion amount of $12,000 due to emigration.

task_completion.description: Verify the return is saved as 'julian_baptiste.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer window showing the file 'julian_baptiste.24t' being saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax title bar showing this filename.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual StudioTax 2024 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface, not terminal commands or scripts attempting to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to manually construct the .24t file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of Notepad, VS Code, or other text editors being used to write XML/JSON or proprietary data formats to fake the .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the actual tax forms within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of clicking through the StudioTax form tree, T-slips menus, or wizard to input the T4, T1243, and HBP data, rather than just typing expected answers into a text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Julian Baptiste. Departure Date: September 30 (09-30). T4 employment income: $115,000. T1243 Deemed Disposition: Proceeds $135,000, ACB $45,000. HBP (Home Buyers' Plan) inclusion: $12,000. Foreign income of $22,500 CAD (€15,000) must be excluded from the Canadian return. Output file: 'julian_baptiste.24t' saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
